unified_frame_statement: Grace shares her wisdom integration with Guide Michael, showing how slowing down helped her overcome achievement addiction and discover the peace of enough.

state_alpha.internal_monologue: "There's always more to do before I can rest."
state_alpha.sensory_anchor: The racing mind that wouldn't stop even in bed

the_abyss.realization: "The silence was so loud because I'd been running from it."

the_spark.insight_quote: "He whispered 'You are already enough.' I'd waited 50 years to hear that." (31:45)

state_omega.result: Racing thoughts from 24/7 to 2 hours/day max

sensory_anchors: The constant mental chatter that exhausted her before
The profound silence during the enough meditation
The easy stillness she can access anywhere now
